message:
feat(numpy): add type inference and scalar return types for numpy functions

- Add numpy function type inference (NumpyArrayFuncs, NumpyScalarFuncs,
  NumpyIntFuncs, NumpyRandomArrayFuncs)
- Add usize_slice NativeType for numpy shape/strides
- Change scalar reduction functions (sum, mean, std, var, min, max,
  prod, argmin, argmax, dot, inner, vdot, norm, det, trace, median,
  percentile) to return f64/i64 directly for performance
- Add numpy array attribute access codegen (.shape, .size, .ndim, .T, .data)
- Add type inference for np.random.* and np.linalg.* nested module calls
